title: Coach 9
summary: A window seat on a train that never arrives. Pastel landscape loops past in parallax; a woman reads, a child points at things that shouldn't be out there.
notes: Procedural parallax loop (~3 min + station stop) with scripted set pieces: pastel cows, pond rowboat, the Wildflowers giant far off, a tunnel that mirrors the interior, a station stop with a sim-language name. Interior is one inline SVG; landscape is canvas clipped to the window and aligned to the SVG slice transform. Three diegetic drift exits: vestibule door, route map, ticket stub. Web Audio rail rhythm; music via cassette player on the table.

admin.notes: Idea #37 from World Ideas.md, selected by James 2026-07-13. Style-first pass; art direction under review.
